command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/setup_acp.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Start Hermes ACP server on port 8765
mkdir -p /home/jose/.config/systemd/user

cat > /home/jose/.config/systemd/user/hermes-acp.service << 'SVCEOF'
[Unit]
Description=Hermes ACP Server
After=network.target hermes-gateway.service

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent
ExecStart=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python -m acp_adapter --port 8765
Restart=always
RestartSec=5s
Environment=HOME=/home/jose

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
SVCEOF

systemctl --user daemon-reload
systemctl --user enable hermes-acp
systemctl --user start hermes-acp
sleep 5
systemctl --user status hermes-acp --no-pager | head -10
ss -tlnp | grep 8765 || echo port_8765_not_open
SHEOF
bash /tmp/setup_acp.sh"
